channel.title: Claude on Joe Muller's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Claude on Joe Muller's Blog

item.title: Creating a VS Code Chat Extension With Claude
item.description: Claude Sonnet is undeniably one of the best frontier models for programming and I still reach for it despite having GPT-4o and o1 inside my VS Code editor. To make it even smarter and more effective, I use the Projects feature (available on the pro plan) to manage all of the documentation and general context related to what I’m working on. By uploading text and files related to the technology I’m using, Claude becomes a genius in exactly what I want him to be a genius in.
